overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at dusk. The scene transitions from streets with elevated highways to waterfront areas and dense neon-lit commercial districts with heavy cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with elevated highway ramps

events.description: transition from dense buildings to waterfront walkway with concrete barriers

agents.ego_description: walking along city sidewalk under elevated highway structure, moving toward waterfront area

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket and red pants walking ahead of ego along the path

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure with monorail tracks casting shadows below
rain-slicked road surface reflecting ambient neon lights
tall industrial concrete wall separating walkway from waterfront

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an urban street dominated by an elevated highway ramp structure overhead. The camera follows a pedestrian in a white jacket along a wet asphalt sidewalk, transitioning toward a waterfront area with industrial concrete barriers visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial intersection with heavy neon signage

events.description: crossing street at intersection while vehicles wait at traffic light
entering covered commercial area with intense pink neon lighting from club signage

agents.ego_description: navigating through crosswalks and entering denser commercial district with increased pedestrian activity

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car driving past the intersection as ego crosses

entered.detail: bright pink neon sign reading 'Licks' on building facade
temporary construction barriers lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character crosses busy intersections in a dense commercial zone, passing yellow construction barriers and navigating moderate traffic. The scene transitions into a more enclosed area dominated by the bright pink neon signage of the 'Licks' club, with pedestrians filling the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with vending machines and neon signs

events.description: shifting from pink neon to green and cyan neon lighting under covered walkway
exiting covered walkway to open area with large stadium structure visible in distance

agents.ego_description: walking through covered pedestrian walkway passing various storefronts and automated vendors

entered.detail: red automated vending machine with glowing interface and product display
large circular stadium building with industrial concrete exterior
hanging red paper lanterns suspended under commercial awnings

segments.scene_description: Moving through a semi-covered walkway illuminated by shifting neon colors, the character passes red vending machines and traditional hanging lanterns. The environment opens up to reveal a massive stadium structure in the distance before transitioning to the next commercial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense multi-level commercial district under overpasses

events.description: entering area with heavy multi-level neon signage and dense commercial buildings
navigating around corner while avoiding pedestrian traffic

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense commercial corridors with heavy foot traffic and overhead neon displays

notable_agents.action: person carrying large bag walking ahead and slightly blocking path

entered.detail: bright red and yellow neon sign for 'Burrito' shop with arrow
large floating holographic advertisement display showing animated content
tall building with multiple stacked levels of shops and cascading neon signs

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a densely packed commercial district with multi-level buildings covered in neon signage. The character passes under overpasses and by holographic billboards, navigating through moderate crowds while the 'Burrito' shop sign and other bright advertisements illuminate the sheltered walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty urban corridor that transforms from an industrial transit zone into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district. It begins on a wet asphalt sidewalk beneath the heavy shadow of an elevated highway ramp, trailing a pedestrian in a white jacket toward a waterfront area marked by concrete barriers. As the camera moves forward, the industrial surroundings give way to busy intersections filled with moderate traffic and yellow construction barriers. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed urban space, where the gray tones of the street are overtaken by the intense pink glow of the Licks club signage and a growing crowd of pedestrians.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that evolves from a semi-covered walkway into a densely packed commercial district. It begins by gliding past red vending machines and traditional hanging lanterns under shifting colored lights, before the view opens up to reveal a massive stadium structure in the distance. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into a crowded commercial zone characterized by multi-level buildings and towering holographic billboards. The scene then passes under heavy overpasses and through sheltered walkways, finally navigating past bright advertisements and a prominent Burrito shop sign amidst the glow of the city.
